title: The Genesis Block: Foundation of the Blockchain
description: A diagram showing the genesis block as the first and unique block in a blockchain, highlighting its special properties and its unbreakable link to all subsequent blocks.
relationships: The Genesis Block is the first block, created manually or by the network founder.
It has no previous block hash (often set to '0' or a specific value).
Each subsequent block contains the hash of the previous block, creating an immutable chain back to the Genesis Block.
